title: Light operating layer with rails and gates
prompt: Create a 16:9 light product operating-layer visual for TSI. Clean white and cool blue-white canvas with translucent panels, precise TSI dark blue #001E41 rails, TSI bright blue #4396F6 active paths, green #66CC00 verified checkpoints, and orange #FF8300 exception markers. Show abstract tokens moving through validation gates and routing lanes. Premium product-system artifact, subtle depth, crisp vector-like clarity, no dark command-center dominance. Leave upper-left logo-safe area. No logos, no readable body text, no fake client/account/patient/borrower data, no watermarks.
notes: Product-system visual for mechanisms, gates, and active routing.
package_asset_policy: full-resolution PNG omitted from compact package; use bundled WebP preview for visual reference and regenerate from prompt metadata for production use.
